blocks.text: City strike back — Arsenal's lead reduced to three with a game in hand
City have a game in hand on the Gunners. Win it, and they're level at the top. Arsenal needed points yesterday — they dropped three instead. The title is wide open.
🎾 Mon 11:00 — Mutua Madrid Open underway. Ruud's clay season begins; Budkov Kjær already through qualifying

blocks.label: ⚽ La Liga title race — Barcelona 9 clear, Madrid must respond
items: Tue 21:30 — Real Madrid vs Alavés. Must win to stay within striking distance of Barcelona
Wed 21:30 — Barcelona vs Celta Vigo. Leaders can tighten their grip at home
Fri 21:00 — Real Madrid at Real Betis. Back-to-back tests — two wins needed to keep pressure on

blocks.text: 🎮 Thu 17:00 — rain & 100 Thieves vs BIG, CCT Global Finals in Porto. Norwegian CS2 legend on the big stage
